series_metadata.series_description: Files on all supplier and liquor permit holders in the State of Ohio containing: the application, investigation questionnaire, all documents required to show proof of eligibility, copies of the permit issued and all renewals issued with the application for the annual renewal.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Permit applications, including Temporary liquor permits are processed through LITS (License Issuance Tracking System) a computerized optical scanning Image System and continually updated. Paper files are kept for 6 months to ensure quality and completeness then destroyed. ; Electronic: Permit applications, including Temporary liquor permits are processed through LITS(License Issuance Tracking System) a computerized optical scanning Image System and continually updated. LITS images are stored forever and then saved to a WORM drive (write once, read many). These images are never purged., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
